sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100170" key="sune/orsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνέορσις</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">f.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.449a</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.); prob. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">συνθροήσεις</foreign>.</entryFree>
